articles.author: Windsor Johnston
articles.title: How TikTok is driving American expats to Southeast Asia - NPR
articles.description: Americans who moved to Vietnam and Thailand say their lives are now lower-stress and lower-cost. But glamorous videos on TikTok don't tell the whole story.
articles.content:
Chad Dunn used to spend his days on the floor of a Hyundai plant in Savannah, Ga., watching the clock, feeling the pressure, and wondering how long he could keep going.
